category_title: Low-achieving vocational students in a computer maintenance class
minimal_context: The student is working on a PC in the classroom to design a laptop flyer using Photoshop.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please start working on your PCs to complete the design of a laptop flyer using Photoshop.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Turns to a classmate) Can you help me understand the required assignment and how to implement it? These regular assignments make me get bored very quickly.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to figure it out together with your peer.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I perceive this task to be difficult to achieve. I don't know how to do the design.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just keep trying your best on the flyer.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Did not participate) I'm not doing this. I'm going to open YouTube and then play collectively on Counterstrike.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please start working on your PCs to complete the design of a laptop flyer using Photoshop.

STUDENT: (Turns to a classmate) Can you help me understand the required assignment and how to implement it? These regular assignments make me get bored very quickly.

TUTOR: Try to figure it out together with your peer.

STUDENT: I perceive this task to be difficult to achieve. I don't know how to do the design.

TUTOR: Just keep trying your best on the flyer.

STUDENT: (Did not participate) I'm not doing this. I'm going to open YouTube and then play collectively on Counterstrike.

task.content: design of a laptop flyer using Photoshop

context.social_setting: collaborating in their effort to finish the assignment

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: perceived some of the tasks to be difficult to achieve
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: perceived some of the tasks to be difficult
